---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened instead.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **Plugin Version**: (e.g., 1.7.1)
- **Obsidian Version**: (e.g., 1.4.16)
- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 10, macOS 13, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Installation Method**: (Manual / Community Plugins)

## Console Output
Please share any error messages from the Developer Console:
1. Open Obsidian
2. Press `Ctrl+Shift+I` (or `Cmd+Option+I` on macOS)
3. Go to the "Console" tab
4. Paste any error messages here (wrap in code block)

```
Paste error output here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., vault size, number of collections, etc.).

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and found no duplicates
- [ ] I have enabled the plugin and attempted to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have checked the [Troubleshooting Guide](https://frostmute.github.io/make-it-rain/user-guide/troubleshooting)
- [ ] My issue provides clear steps to reproduce
